name: Souffleed Crepes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, beat the egg yolks with part of the milk until combined.
2. Gradually add flour, sugar, and salt, stirring constantly to ensure no lumps form.
3. Add the remaining milk gradually while continuing to stir.
4. Stir in the melted butter until well incorporated.
5. In a separate clean bowl, beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
6. Gently fold the beaten egg white mixture into the batter, taking care not to deflate it.
7. Heat a crepe pan over medium heat and grease with butter.
8. Pour about 1/3 of the batter into the center of the hot pan, swirling to evenly coat the bottom.
9. Cover the pan with a lid or aluminum foil for about 10 minutes, then carefully remove the foil.
10. Continue cooking the remaining batter as desired, either in the crepe pan or in a large buttered baking dish preheated to 375°F (190°C).
11. Bake for 25-30 minutes until golden brown and puffed.
12. Top with your choice of sweet fillings like strawberries, apples, lemon zest, brandy, or vanilla extract.
This recipe creates a souffle-like texture when baked in the oven instead of being cooked on a stovetop.
